speaker: MATT
raw_text: That's all right. So I need you to roll another constitution check, if you could.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You smile as you hear a splash behind you. Percival getting right up to the edge and leaping, as his foot catches the stone and goes right into the smaller rapid, being carried, as well. Keyleth?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: The people who are in the water, are they being dragged under? We can just not see them anymore?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: If you take a moment to watch--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, Percy? Percy?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I think I'm fine. I'm just wet.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Is he being carried away?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The three who've been pulled under the river-- that includes you, Vex'ahlia, Vax'ildan, and Percy-- I need you to make a constitution check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Constitution?!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Why does everything here hate us?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Ugh! Oh Jesus! Six.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You're going to die live.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Ten.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Why am I rolling so bad right now?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 14. Okay, you manage to pull yourself up to the surface and you almost get to the point of actually getting some air, and a force pulls you back under.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Percy! Aw. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: However, Percy, you do maintain the breath in your lungs. You and your brother both (coughs) give away a bulk of the air, and you feel yourself in the beginning spasms of drowning.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can I cast Grasping Vine from the side of the river and try to catch myself?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You know what? Yes, you can. In the aspects of this sequence though, it is a difficult job to cast this. Is it a concentration check or not?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I don't know!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Grasping Vine is a bonus action, yo!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: But is it a concentration spell? That is the difference.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I don't have my card because we're traveling.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Matt, how far are they from me?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: From you guys out there, they're maybe 25 feet from you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Wait. No, it is. Sorry.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: I need you to roll another strength check, Pike, as you pull them in. There is a little more weight on there, so the DC's going to be a little higher. Go ahead and roll.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I got you, buddy.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Come on, Monstah.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Oh wait. Hold on. Where did it go? I'm sorry, I forgot how to play.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I believe it's a plus four.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 18. Without an issue, you watch as this giant anchor of a man is being held solid by this tiny rock of a gnomish cleric.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Yes! (cheering)

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Go get him, Grog!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (muffled) Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You watch as her teeth bite down, and her tongue sticks out the edge as she digs her feet into the bottom of the river rock. Percy, you see a dark form in the river as you're rushing past. I need you to make a perception check with disadvantage, as you're being drawn underwater.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Perception check with disadvantage?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This is a perception check with disadvantage.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's not that bad. Where's my perception? There it is: 14.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 14, okay. Just as you see this strange dark form appear out of the way, you instinctively sweep your hand out, and you smack and catch the edge of Grog's pants.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: He has pants? (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: At the hip. And you catch it. Grog, you see the hand emerge, and you catch the edge of it and pull him up out of the river. He's now out. Caught his breath; he's no longer beneath the surface. You guys are still being pulled, now, by the water. Your feet are beginning to fall out from under you as the rocks that are holding you up are being pulled along by the force of the river. It seems the longer you're in the river, the stronger it's getting.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh shit. Pike! Pull! I got him!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right, and your brother does well. Of course he does. You guys all manage to catch yourselves right now, still attached by the rope as you now see this heaping 15- to 20-foot-long giant barrel of muscle, green scaled skin, but what looks to be hundreds of tiny roots that spread from the center of its midsection, reaching into the ground. As it begins to move forward, it's actually rooting and uprooting itself as it moves. You can see the moisture and the life force of the land is pulsing into its form as it holds Grog in its jaws. I need you all to roll initiative. (cheering)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Good river. Good boy.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Can I keep an eye out for whatever I stepped on in the river?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, make a perception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Six!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Grog, being in the front of the troupe, as the river is slowly separated for this, you step down into the mud, and you don't notice a similar shift curl up behind you as suddenly a rapid (whoosh). A set of gargantuan, long tooth-filled jaws come pouring out of the mud underneath the bank, snapping towards your large half-giant form. (evil chuckle) It has begun. That is a 22 to hit. I believe that hits your armor class.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That'll hit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty. Getting ready for the first real attack damage of tonight's episode.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: How come we never noticed the battle map has a river on it? Oh no!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You suffer 27 points of piercing damage. (groaning, laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You, Grog, are suddenly grappled. The jaws have latched onto your midsection and hold you. You guys look ahead as you see this form, this spray of dark grimy mud and river-bottom muck gets flung into the air. You see what looks to be a far larger than you've ever seen before crocodile-like entity has come bursting out from under the river. You see the sheer force of the impact pushes him forward and carries him onto the other side of the river, in doing so, dragging all of you behind him at a rapid pace.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We're across!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Most of you go flying in an arc at the sheer force of this impact. I need you guys to make acrobatics checks to try to stop yourselves.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's not a catfish!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Acrobatics or athletics?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Acrobatics.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's my jam. 27.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Well, that ends the crocodile's turn, and it is now your turn. Currently, you cannot take reactions, and I need you to roll a d8 to see what you do.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Fuck! I mean, 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 20, okay, so it still hits you. All right, so the stinger (whipcrack) grinds itself into your flesh, tears through the armor separation there, and you can feel pulsing. I need you to go ahead and make a constitution saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Because that's my strength.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You got this.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Do I?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You do.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Ten!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, you take 16 points of piercing damage from the actual stinger itself striking you. You now feel that pulse of venom through your body, and as it begins to swell through you, you feel all the colors and all the images of the landscape around you begin to shift and bubble and move.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You're tripping, man.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You are tripping balls right now. You look to your left and see Garmelie next to you, whose frightened expression becomes suddenly this giant feral wolverine that hisses at you! You look to your right, and you see the giant crocodile holding Percy suddenly merge into one strange, giant Medusa creature. You don't know which way is up and down, and you are extremely frightened and confused.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You're frightened? Oh no, it's a bad trip.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Does that mean I lose my turn?
